title: SUB GEOGRAPHY TOPIC 1 PENINSULAR RIVERS 2 DAMS,LAKES

questions.question: 1. Which Prime Minister referred to dams as the "Temples of Modern India"? / किस प्रधानमंत्री ने बांधों को "आधुनिक भारत के मंदिर" कहा था?
options: Lal Bahadur Shastri / लाल बहादुर शास्त्री
questions.explanation: Jawaharlal Nehru used this phrase to highlight the importance of dams in India's development.

questions.question: 2. Which is the highest dam in India? / भारत का सबसे ऊँचा बाँध कौन सा है?
options: Bhakra Nangal Dam / भाखड़ा नांगल बाँध
Sardar Sarovar Dam / सरदार सरोवर बाँध
questions.explanation: Tehri Dam in Uttarakhand is the highest dam in India, built on the Bhagirathi river.

questions.question: 3. On which river is the Hirakud Dam built? / हीराकुड बाँध किस नदी पर बना है?
questions.explanation: Hirakud Dam in Odisha is one of the longest dams in the world, built on the Mahanadi.

questions.question: 4. Bhakra Nangal Dam is situated on which river? / भाखड़ा नांगल बाँध किस नदी पर स्थित है?
questions.explanation: It is one of the highest gravity dams in the world, located on the Satluj river.

questions.question: 5. In which state is the Idukki Arch Dam located? / इडुक्की आर्क बाँध किस राज्य में स्थित है?
questions.explanation: Idukki Dam is one of the highest arch dams in Asia, built on the Periyar river.

questions.question: 6. Which dam is built on the Krishna River in Andhra Pradesh? / आंध्र प्रदेश में कृष्णा नदी पर कौन सा बाँध बना है?
options: Nagarjuna Sagar Dam / नागार्जुन सागर बाँध
questions.explanation: Nagarjuna Sagar is a major masonry dam built on the Krishna river.

questions.question: 7. The Sardar Sarovar Dam is built on which river? / सरदार सरोवर बाँध किस नदी पर बना है?
questions.explanation: This dam is a key part of the Narmada Valley Project in Gujarat.

questions.question: 8. Which is the largest freshwater lake in India? / भारत की सबसे बड़ी मीठे पानी की झील कौन सी है?
questions.explanation: Wular Lake in Jammu & Kashmir is the largest freshwater lake in India.

questions.question: 9. Which lake is a famous saltwater lagoon in Odisha? / ओडिशा में कौन सी झील एक प्रसिद्ध खारे पानी की लैगून है?
questions.explanation: Chilika is Asia's largest brackish water lagoon and a UNESCO site.

questions.question: 10. In which state is the Loktak Lake (famous for Phumdis) located? / लोकतक झील (फुमदी के लिए प्रसिद्ध) किस राज्य में स्थित है?
questions.explanation: Loktak is the largest freshwater lake in NE India and home to Keibul Lamjao National Park.

questions.question: 11. Which is the longest lake in India? / भारत की सबसे लंबी झील कौन सी है?
questions.explanation: Vembanad Lake in Kerala is the longest lake in India and host to Nehru Trophy boat race.

questions.question: 12. Which lake in Rajasthan is the largest inland saltwater lake in India? / राजस्थान की कौन सी झील भारत की सबसे बड़ी अंतर्देशीय खारे पानी की झील है?
questions.explanation: Sambhar Lake is a major source of salt production in India.

questions.question: 13. Lonar Lake in Maharashtra was formed by which process? / महाराष्ट्र की लोनार झील किस प्रक्रिया से बनी थी?
questions.explanation: Lonar Lake is a crater lake created by a meteorite impact thousands of years ago.

questions.question: 14. Which artificial lake is the largest in India by volume? / आयतन के हिसाब से भारत की सबसे बड़ी कृत्रिम झील कौन सी है?
options: Govind Ballabh Pant Sagar / गोविंद बल्लभ पंत सागर
questions.explanation: This reservoir is formed by the Rihand Dam in Uttar Pradesh.

questions.question: 15. What is the highest waterfall in India? / भारत का सबसे ऊँचा जलप्रपात कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: Kunchikal Falls in Karnataka is the highest waterfall in India (approx 455m).

questions.question: 16. Jog Falls is located on which river? / जोग जलप्रपात किस नदी पर स्थित है?
questions.explanation: Jog Falls is a major tourist attraction in Karnataka on the Sharavati river.

questions.question: 17. Which waterfall is known as the "Niagara of India"? / किस जलप्रपात को "भारत का नियाग्रा" कहा जाता है?
questions.explanation: Chitrakoot Falls in Chhattisgarh is called so due to its horseshoe shape.

questions.question: 18. On which river is the Shivasamudram Falls situated? / शिवसमुद्रम जलप्रपात किस नदी पर स्थित है?
questions.explanation: It is located in Karnataka and is home to one of India's first hydroelectric projects.

questions.question: 19. Dudhsagar Falls is located on the border of which two states? / दूधसागर जलप्रपात किन दो राज्यों की सीमा पर स्थित है?
options: Karnataka and Kerala / कर्नाटक और केरल
Goa and Karnataka / गोवा और कर्नाटक
Andhra and Odisha / आंध्र और ओडिशा
Maharashtra and Goa / महाराष्ट्र और गोवा
questions.explanation: Dudhsagar Falls is located on the Mandovi river.

questions.question: 20. Which dam is known as the "Granary of South India"? / किस बाँध को "दक्षिण भारत का अन्न भंडार" कहा जाता है?
options: Krishna Raja Sagara / कृष्ण राज सागर
questions.explanation: Mettur Dam on the Kaveri river provides irrigation to vast areas of Tamil Nadu.

questions.question: 21. On which river is the Baglihar Dam constructed? / बगलिहार बाँध किस नदी पर बनाया गया है?
questions.explanation: Baglihar Hydroelectric Power Project is located in Jammu and Kashmir on the Chenab.

questions.question: 22. Pong Dam (Maharana Pratap Sagar) is built on which river? / पोंग बाँध (महाराणा प्रताप सागर) किस नदी पर बना है?
questions.explanation: It is a major earth-fill embankment dam on the Beas river in Himachal Pradesh.

questions.question: 23. Which lake is shared between Andhra Pradesh and Tamil Nadu? / आंध्र प्रदेश और तमिलनाडु के बीच कौन सी झील साझा की जाती है?
questions.explanation: Pulicat Lake is the second largest brackish water lagoon in India.

questions.question: 24. The famous Dal Lake is located in which city? / प्रसिद्ध डल झील किस शहर में स्थित है?
questions.explanation: Dal Lake is known as the "Jewel in the crown of Kashmir".

questions.question: 25. On which river is the Ranapratap Sagar Dam built? / राणाप्रताप सागर बाँध किस नदी पर बना है?
questions.explanation: It is one of the four dams built on the Chambal river in Rajasthan.

questions.question: 26. Which waterfall is formed by the Narmada river near Jabalpur? / जबलपुर के पास नर्मदा नदी द्वारा कौन सा जलप्रपात बनाया जाता है?
questions.explanation: Dhuandhar Falls is famous for its marble rocks and mist-like appearance.

questions.question: 27. In which state is the Renuka Lake located? / रेणुका झील किस राज्य में स्थित है?
questions.explanation: Renuka Lake is the largest lake in Himachal Pradesh.

questions.question: 28. The Almatti Dam project is a bone of contention between which states? / अलमट्टी बाँध परियोजना किन राज्यों के बीच विवाद का विषय है?
options: Andhra and Tamil Nadu / आंध्र और तमिलनाडु
Maharashtra and MP / महाराष्ट्र और एमपी
Karnataka and Andhra / कर्नाटक और आंध्र
Kerala and Tamil Nadu / केरल और तमिलनाडु
questions.explanation: It is a hydroelectric project on the Krishna river in North Karnataka.

questions.question: 29. Which is the world's highest waterfall? / विश्व का सबसे ऊँचा जलप्रपात कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: Angel Falls in Venezuela is the highest waterfall in the world (979m).

questions.question: 30. At which lake is the Nehru Trophy Boat Race held? / नेहरू ट्रॉफी बोट रेस किस झील में आयोजित की जाती है?
questions.explanation: This famous snake boat race (Vallam Kali) takes place in Kerala every year.

questions.question: 1. Which is the longest river of Peninsular India? / प्रायद्वीपीय भारत की सबसे लंबी नदी कौन सी है?
questions.explanation: Godavari is 1465 km long and is also known as "Dakshin Ganga".

questions.question: 2. Which river is known as the "Laxmi of Kerala"? / किस नदी को "केरल की लक्ष्मी" के रूप में जाना जाता है?
questions.explanation: Pamba river flows into the Vembanad Lake and is considered sacred.

questions.question: 3. Which river forms the "Dhuandhar Falls" near Jabalpur? / जबलपुर के पास "धुआँधार जलप्रपात" कौन सी नदी बनाती है?
questions.explanation: The Narmada river creates this famous waterfall while flowing through marble rocks.

questions.question: 4. Which river originates from the Amarkantak Plateau? / अमरकंटक पठार से किस नदी का उद्गम होता है?
questions.explanation: Narmada originates from the Amarkantak hills in Madhya Pradesh.

questions.question: 5. Which river is known as the "Life line of Goa"? / किस नदी को "गोवा की जीवन रेखा" कहा जाता है?
questions.explanation: Mandovi is a major river of Goa, and Panaji is situated on its banks.

questions.question: 6. Which river is an example of an "Inland Drainage" system? / कौन सी नदी "अंतर्देशीय अपवाह" प्रणाली का उदाहरण है?
questions.explanation: Luni disappears in the Rann of Kutch and does not reach the sea.

questions.question: 7. The "Shivanasamudra Falls" is located on which river? / "शिवसमुद्रम जलप्रपात" किस नदी पर स्थित है?
questions.explanation: This waterfall is located in Karnataka on the Kaveri river.

questions.question: 8. Which river flows through a Rift Valley? / कौन सी नदी रिफ्ट घाटी (भ्रंश घाटी) से होकर बहती है?
questions.explanation: Narmada and Tapti are the major rivers flowing through rift valleys in India.

questions.question: 9. Which is the second largest river basin in India? / भारत का दूसरा सबसे बड़ा नदी बेसिन कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: Godavari has the second largest drainage basin after the Ganga.

questions.question: 10. Which river is known as "Dakshin Ganga"? / किस नदी को "दक्षिण गंगा" के नाम से जाना जाता है?
questions.explanation: Due to its large size and extent, Godavari is called Dakshin Ganga.

questions.question: 11. Which river originates from Mahabaleshwar? / महाबलेश्वर से किस नदी का उद्गम होता है?
questions.explanation: Krishna river originates near Mahabaleshwar in Maharashtra.

questions.question: 12. Pranhita is a combined stream of which rivers? / प्राणहिता किन नदियों की संयुक्त धारा है?
options: Wardha, Wainganga, Penganga / वर्धा, वैनगंगा, पेनगंगा
questions.explanation: These three rivers join to form the Pranhita, a major tributary of Godavari.

questions.question: 13. Which river is known as the "Sorrow of Odisha"? / किस नदी को "ओडिशा का शोक" कहा जाता है?
questions.explanation: Mahanadi was historically known for causing devastating floods in Odisha.

questions.question: 14. On which river is the "Stanley Reservoir" (Mettur Dam) built? / "स्टेनली जलाशय" (मेट्टूर बांध) किस नदी पर बना है?
questions.explanation: Mettur Dam is one of the largest dams in India, located on the Kaveri river.

questions.question: 15. Which is the longest west-flowing river of India? / भारत की पश्चिम की ओर बहने वाली सबसे लंबी नदी कौन सी है?
questions.explanation: Narmada is the largest west-flowing river that drains into the Arabian Sea.

questions.question: 16. Which river crosses the Tropic of Cancer twice? / कौन सी नदी कर्क रेखा को दो बार पार करती है?
questions.explanation: Mahi is the only river in India that cuts the Tropic of Cancer twice.

questions.question: 17. Through which states does the Kaveri river flow? / कावेरी नदी किन राज्यों से होकर बहती है?
questions.explanation: The Kaveri basin includes parts of Karnataka, Kerala, and Tamil Nadu.

questions.question: 18. Which river forms an Estuary instead of a Delta? / कौन सी नदी डेल्टा के बजाय एस्टुअरी (ज्वारनदमुख) बनाती है?
questions.explanation: West flowing rivers like Narmada and Tapti form estuaries due to their fast flow.

questions.question: 19. Which is the largest tributary of the Krishna river? / कृष्णा नदी की सबसे बड़ी सहायक नदी कौन सी है?
questions.explanation: Tungabhadra is the largest tributary of the Krishna river by volume.

questions.question: 20. Which river is known as "Vridha Ganga"? / किस नदी को "वृद्ध गंगा" कहा जाता है?
questions.explanation: Godavari is also referred to as Vridha (Old) Ganga because of its age.

questions.question: 21. "Indravati" is a major tributary of which river? / "इंद्रावती" किस नदी की प्रमुख सहायक नदी है?
questions.explanation: Indravati flows through Chhattisgarh and joins the Godavari.

questions.question: 22. Where does the Krishna river drain into the sea? / कृष्णा नदी समुद्र में कहाँ गिरती है?
options: Gulf of Khambhat / खंभात की खाड़ी
Bay of Bengal / बंगाल की खाड़ी
questions.explanation: Krishna river forms a large delta and flows into the Bay of Bengal.

questions.question: 23. Which river is famous for "Marble Rocks"? / कौन सी नदी "मार्बल रॉक्स" (संगमरमर की चट्टानें) के लिए प्रसिद्ध है?
questions.explanation: Narmada flows through a deep gorge of white marble in Bhedaghat, Jabalpur.

questions.question: 24. Sabarmati river originates from which mountain range? / साबरमती नदी किस पर्वत श्रृंखला से निकलती है?
questions.explanation: Sabarmati originates in the Aravalli Range of Rajasthan.

questions.question: 25. The city of Hyderabad is situated on the banks of which river? / हैदराबाद शहर किस नदी के तट पर स्थित है?
questions.explanation: Musi is a tributary of the Krishna river that flows through Hyderabad.

questions.question: 26. Which river is known as the "Lifeline of Sikkim"? / किस नदी को "सिक्किम की जीवन रेखा" कहा जाता है?
questions.explanation: Teesta is the most important river for the state of Sikkim.

questions.question: 27. Which river is called "Ponnani" in Kerala? / केरल में किस नदी को "पोन्नानी" कहा जाता है?
questions.explanation: Bharatappuzha is the second longest river in Kerala.

questions.question: 28. The "Jog Falls" is associated with which river? / "जोग जलप्रपात" किस नदी से संबंधित है?
questions.explanation: Jog Falls in Karnataka is one of the highest plunge waterfalls in India.

questions.question: 29. Subarnarekha river flows through which states? / सुवर्णरेखा नदी किन राज्यों से होकर बहती है?
options: Jharkhand, WB, Odisha / झारखंड, पश्चिम बंगाल, ओडिशा
questions.explanation: It is famous for the Hundru Falls located in Jharkhand.

questions.question: 30. Which river is also known as "Handmaid of Narmada"? / किस नदी को "नर्मदा की दासी" भी कहा जाता है?
questions.explanation: Tapti flows parallel to Narmada and is often associated with it.
